title: Diffraction data for Zajdel et al Turning Molecular Springs into Nano-Shock Absorbers ACS Appl. Mater. Interfaces 2022, 14, 26699−26713
author: Zajdel, Pawel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Datasets required to reproduce: 
 Individual files 
 Fig. 1,- XRDs of materials collected on DiscoverD, CuKa 
 (BT-1.zip) 
 Fig. 4a. - neutron powder diffraction of ZIF-8 + 2D2O/1H2O mix collected at the BT-1 diffractometer of the NIST Center of Neutron Research at 30C. For  plot the data were normalized to a common scale in counts/h 
 Fig. 4c. Fullprof PCR file and VESTA model with the volmetric data *.pgrid 
 Fig. 4d Single detector file Z8221010.bt1 and raw pressure output + reduced data (Zenodo_30C_drops_Fig4d.DAT). 
 Fig. 4b VSANS (110) integration results Up and Down (VSANS.zip)
